name: Khadira
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Pitta and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: The go-to herb for chronic skin diseases like leprosy and eczema.
Effective for mouth ulcers and gum bleeding.
plantProfile: Heartwood extract is common in traditional 'Paan' preparations.
preparationMethods: Bark decoction or as a paste for skin application.
safetyProfile: Too much can cause severe constipation.
